> **How website requests work**
> Read [Working with the website team](https://posthog.com/handbook/marketing/working-with-website) for the full process. In short: draft your content in a Google Doc, submit it here, the website team will build from that and open a PR for you to review.

## What do you need?

_Briefly describe what you're asking for — e.g. "new product page for X", "copy overhaul of the Y landing page"_

## Draft content

_Link to your Google Doc with the full draft copy. The website team will work from this, so it should be as complete as possible before submitting._

## References & examples

_Any pages, designs, or examples that are useful context. Don't be too prescriptive — Cory & Eli will handle the design._

## Deadline

_Is there a specific date this needs to go live by? If so, why?_
